case_title: CHUCK C CHACK VS. SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF PUBLIC HEALTH
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHUCK CHACK'S NOTICE OF APPEAL OF ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 09 2017 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CHUCK CHACK'S NOTICE OF APPEAL OF ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION - THE COURT RENEWS ITS PRIOR TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CHUCK CHAK'S APPEAL OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION IS DENIED. THE TESTIMONY OF SOJEATTA KHIM AND PHOTOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE SHOW THAT NAILS WERE USED TO LOCK THE DOORS AND THUS PETITIONER VIOLATED SECTIONS 29.31(G) AND 29.32 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CODE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 =302/HK
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-25-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHUCK CHACK'S NOTICE OF APPEAL OF ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 25, 2017, AT 9:30 A.M, IN DEPT. 302, PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. MS. IRAVANI GAVE NOTICE TO MR. SNODGRASS BY WAY OF TELEPHONE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Appeal Of Administrative Decision
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEILA VAEZ TRAVANI SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR V. ROY LEFCOURT, TELEPHONE NO. 1-408-686-1919 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-4675 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CHUCK CHACK'S Notice Of Appeal Of Administrative Decision - The court renews its prior tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Chuck Chak's appeal of the administrative decision is denied. The testimony of Sojeatta Khim and photographic evidence show that nails were used to lock the doors and thus petitioner violated sections 29.31(g) and 29.32 of the San Francisco Health Code. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Appeal Of Administrative Decision
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To May-25-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
